summary: Completed comprehensive testing of upgraded Neo4j fake news detection system with new scoring formula. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success). Frontend UI displays new score breakdown, formula visualization, and Cypher query references excellently (100% success). System correctly implements score = (source_count * 5) + (author_count * 3) + (topic_frequency * 2) formula with proper thresholds and new label format.
passed_tests: Health Check - Neo4j connected properly
Seed Database - Successfully seeded 30 articles
Analyze Fake Article - truthrevealed.net scored 40.0 as 'Suspicious' (correct threshold 30-70)
Analyze Trustworthy Article - reuters scored 0.0 as 'Likely True' (correct threshold <30)
Neo4j Reason Format - Reason contains Cypher query references like 'graph query: MATCH'
Score Formula Verification - (source_count * 5) + (author_count * 3) + (topic_frequency * 2) math verified
Response Format - All required fields present: score, label, reason, breakdown, explanation, entities, graph_data
Breakdown Structure - Contains source_count, author_count, topic_frequency, formula, raw_score, capped_score
Get Graph Data - Returns 218 nodes and 237 links for D3.js visualization
Get Statistics - Returns node counts, verdict distribution, suspicious sources with new labels
Get History - Returns analysis history with scores and new label format
Invalid Request Handling - Properly rejects articles under 10 characters
Frontend App Loading - All components load correctly with navigation
Analysis Panel - Input fields, source, author, and analyze button work perfectly
Results Panel - Score gauge, verdict badge with new format ('Suspicious', 'Likely True', 'Likely Fake')
Score Breakdown Section - Formula visualization: (source:3 x 5) + (author:3 x 3) + (topic:8 x 2) = 40
Breakdown Bars - Visual bars for Source x5, Author x3, Topic x2 multipliers
Reason Section - Contains detailed explanations with Cypher query references
Entity Extraction - spaCy extracts organizations, persons, locations, topics correctly
History Panel - Shows analysis records with scores and new label format badges
Stats Panel - Displays verdict distribution, source credibility, node counts with new labels
Graph Visualization - Interactive D3.js graph with 228 nodes, proper color coding, full-screen mode
Label Format Update - All UI shows 'Suspicious'/'Likely True'/'Likely Fake' instead of old UPPERCASE
Threshold Implementation - <30 = Likely True, 30-70 = Suspicious, >70 = Likely Fake working correctly
